Backup.title: User Backup Data
Backup.description: User specific session data, settings, and prediction history.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the record owner

winCount.description: Total won predictions in current session

lossCount.description: Total lost predictions in current session

historyLogs.description: Array of prediction outcome history logs

targetUrl.description: Domain targeted by active session proxy

backupTime.description: Formatted string timestamp of current upload

processedPeriods.description: Wingo period numbers which have already been evaluated

/backups/{userId}.description: Collection storing the latest user settings and metrics backup.
